channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Console Archives Seicross launches April 9
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Switch 2

Pilot a hover bike to save the peaceful people of Petra.

Console Archives Seicross will launch for PlayStation 5 and Switch 2 on April 9 for $7.99 / 800 yen, developer Hamster announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Hamster:

Seicross was released by Nichibutsu in 1986 for an 8-bit home console.

In this shooting game, you pilot a hover bike to save the peaceful people of Petra, whose homeland has been invaded by a once-coexisting tribe that has turned to evil.

As you rescue the captive people of Petra from enemy territory, your bike’s weight increases, causing it to consume fuel energy much faster—but in return, you’ll earn massive bonuses upon clearing the stage!

The Console Archives series is developed with the concept of faithfully reproducing masterpieces released on various home game consoles, allowing players to easily enjoy them on the latest hardware.

The series is packed with convenient features, including customizable button layouts and screen settings, as well as the ability to save and load at any point.

Whether you played them back in the day or are experiencing them for the first time, please enjoy the masterpieces that shaped the history of console gaming!

(The options menu and manual are available in Japanese, English, French, German, Italian, and Spanish.)

Watch the official trailer below.

Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/console-archives-seicross-launches-april-9
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Forza Horizon 6 ‘Prologue’ gameplay
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

An introduction to Horizon Japan.

publisher Xbox Game Studios and developer Playground Games have released a six-minute “Prologue” gameplay video of Japan-set open-world racing game Forza Horizon 6.

The video description reads: “A new Horizon Festival is kicking off! This celebration of automotive culture and music is known to start with a bang, and this time is no exception. Drive next to a bullet train in a 2024 Nissan GT-R Nismo, take on massive jumps in a 2021 RJ Anderson #37 Polaris RZR Pro 4 Truck fitted for snow, get your first taste of the Touge roads of Japan in a 1995 Porsche 911 GT2 and drive our cover car, the 2025 GR GT Prototype for the very first time. Songs, cars, jumps—Forza Horizon 6‘s prologue is the perfect introduction to your experience in Horizon Japan.”

Forza Horizon 6 is due out for Xbox Series and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store on May 19, followed by PlayStation 5 later in 2026.

Watch the footage below.

Prologue Gameplay



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/forza-horizon-6-prologue-gameplay
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: DoDonPachi Resurrection Reignite announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

"A new battlefield emerges for bullet hell shooters."

CAVE Interactive has announced shoot ’em up revival DoDonPachi Resurrection Reignite for PC (Steam). A release date was not announced. It will support English, French, German, Spanish, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, and Simplified Chinese language options.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

NOT DEAD YET. THE BATTLE CONTINUES.

Rekindle your fighting spirit. A new battlefield emerges for bullet hell shooters.

CAVE’s bullet hell shooter DoDonPachi Resurrection returns to the modern era as DoDonPachi Resurrection Reignite. Overwhelming bullet patterns, intense tactical play, and the exhilaration that lies beyond the limit—the original frenzy remains intact, now enhanced with new elements to welcome a new generation of challengers.

Key Features

  • Preserving the Arcade Thrill and Systems – Experience once more the beauty of meticulously designed bullet patterns and the exhilaration of weaving through them.
  • Assist Features for Both Returning and New Challengers – Implements new features that support fresh challenges for everyone, from beginners to returning players.
  • Additional Stages, a New Character, and New Music – Without compromising the appeal of the original, they add fresh excitement and broader ways to play.
  • Additional Features Hinting at a New Battlefield – What lies beyond this reignition has yet to be revealed.

Visit the teaser website here.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/dodonpachi-resurrection-reignite-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
